title: Tolyatti, Samara Oblast — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tolyatti, Samara Oblast: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tolyatti is a city in Samara Oblast with a population of 690,000. The automobile capital of Russia, home to AvtoVAZ (Lada), a planned industrial city on the Volga River.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
